description: Comprehensive provenance comparison table of all evidence for scully-HSD17B10 orthology
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive provenance summary figure
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(16, 10))
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title("Provenance Summary: SCU (O18404) vs HSD17B10 (Q99714) Orthology & Function", 
             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

# Build the comprehensive comparison table
headers = ["Feature", "SCU (O18404)", "HSD17B10 (Q99714)", "Match"]
rows = [
    ["Organism", "D. melanogaster", "H. sapiens", "—"],
    ["Protein name", "3-hydroxyacyl-CoA DH type-2", "3-hydroxyacyl-CoA DH type-2", "Identical"],
    ["Length (aa)", "255", "261", "~97%"],
    ["Seq. identity", "—", "—", "73.1%"],
    ["Seq. similarity", "—", "—", "83.1%"],
    ["Pfam domain", "PF00106 (adh_short)", "PF00106 (adh_short)", "Identical"],
    ["InterPro family", "IPR002347 (SDR)", "IPR002347 (SDR)", "Identical"],
    ["PANTHER subfamily", "PTHR43658:SF8", "PTHR43658:SF8", "Identical"],
    ["OrthoDB group", "1274115at2759", "1274115at2759", "Identical"],
    ["eggNOG", "KOG1199", "KOG1199", "Identical"],
    ["EC number", "1.1.1.35", "1.1.1.35", "Identical"],
    ["Rossmann motif", "TGGASGLG (pos 10-17)", "TGGASGLG (pos 16-23)", "Identical"],
    ["Catalytic Ser", "S149", "S155", "Conserved"],
    ["Catalytic Tyr", "Y162 (active site)", "Y168 (active site)", "Conserved"],
    ["Catalytic Lys", "K166", "K172", "Conserved"],
    ["YxxxK motif", "YSASK (162-166)", "YSASK (168-172)", "Identical"],
    ["NCAG motif", "pos 84-87", "pos 90-93", "Identical"],
    ["Binding sites", "11 annotated", "11 annotated", "11/11 (100%)"],
    ["S-Y CA dist. (AF)", "8.89 A", "8.81 A", "Delta 0.08 A"],
    ["S-K CA dist. (AF)", "5.92 A", "5.87 A", "Delta 0.05 A"],
    ["Y-K CA dist. (AF)", "6.23 A", "6.24 A", "Delta 0.01 A"],
    ["pLDDT (mean)", "97.4", "96.9", "Both >95"],
    ["Localization", "Mito. matrix (IDA)", "Mito. matrix (TAS)", "Both mito."],
    ["RNase P role", "MRPP2 (IDA)", "MRPP2 (IDA)", "Both"],
    ["GO:0003857 (MF)", "IEA", "IDA", "Gap: upgrade?"],
    ["GO:0006635 (BP)", "Absent", "IDA", "Gap: add?"],
    ["GO:0006631 (BP)", "IDA", "IBA", "SCU stronger"],
]

# Create table
table = ax.table(
    cellText=rows,
    colLabels=headers,
    cellLoc='center',
    loc='center',
    colWidths=[0.22, 0.28, 0.28, 0.22]
)

table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8.5)
table.scale(1, 1.25)

# Style header
for j in range(4):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#1565C0')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold', fontsize=9)

# Color code match column
for i in range(1, len(rows) + 1):
    match_val = rows[i-1][3]
    if match_val in ['Identical', 'Conserved', '11/11 (100%)', 'Both mito.', 'Both', 'Both >95']:
        table[i, 3].set_facecolor('#C8E6C9')  # green
    elif 'Delta' in match_val and float(match_val.split()[1]) < 0.1:
        table[i, 3].set_facecolor('#C8E6C9')  # green
    elif match_val in ['73.1%', '83.1%', '~97%']:
        table[i, 3].set_facecolor('#DCEDC8')  # light green
    elif 'Gap' in match_val:
        table[i, 3].set_facecolor('#FFF9C4')  # yellow - annotation gap
    elif match_val == 'SCU stronger':
        table[i, 3].set_facecolor('#E3F2FD')  # light blue
    
    # Alternate row shading
    if i % 2 == 0:
        for j in range(3):
            table[i, j].set_facecolor('#F5F5F5')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("provenance_table.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Provenance table saved.")
